/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libLIB_BERT.a  CMakeFiles/LIB_BERT.dir/he.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LIB_BERT.dir/nonlinear.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LIB_BERT.dir/linear.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LIB_BERT.dir/linear_old.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LIB_BERT.dir/ckks_bert.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LIB_BERT.dir/ckks_bert_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LIB_BERT.dir/bert_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LIB_BERT.dir/bert.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libLIB_BERT.a
